problem_description: CFA youth soccer league in Orange County processes 2,000–3,000 uniform orders per season across jerseys, shorts, and socks in 14 size codes. Orders must be placed before demand is realized. The current Adidas jersey model (Tiro 25) is in its final lifecycle year — unsold inventory cannot be reordered next season. Minimize total cost across overage, underage, and procurement subject to a seasonal budget and supplier minimum order quantities.
problem_title: CFA Uniform Ordering Optimization — Tiro 25 Year 2

objective.description: Minimize total expected newsvendor cost across all 14 sizes × 3 product categories × upcoming seasons — weighted by lifecycle year cost structure (Year 2 underage penalty is ~5x higher than Year 1 due to jersey discontinuation).

constraints.name: seasonal_budget
constraints.description: Total procurement spend per season cannot exceed league budget

parameters.note: Estimated from proposal — update with real budget

constraints.name: minimum_order_quantity
constraints.description: Adidas requires minimum 6 units per size per order

constraints.name: carryover_inventory
constraints.description: Year 1 unsold stock carries to Year 2 at zero holding cost

cost_structure.name: overage_cost
cost_structure.description: Year 1: storage / opportunity cost of unsold jersey

cost_structure.name: overage_cost
cost_structure.description: Year 2: sold on eBay at loss — salvage discount + fees

cost_structure.name: underage_cost
cost_structure.description: Year 1: rush order premium + extra shipping

cost_structure.name: underage_cost
cost_structure.description: Year 2: discontinued model — secondhand premium or lost sale + parent unhappy

cost_structure.description: Generic socks — easier to source at premium
